== Mutated Tentacle ==
This mollusk tentacle was found in the sea near Bihini Island. It was tested by a Geiger counter and its radiation index was 30 million times the normal air index!

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Mutated Tentacle
|Rarity=purple
|ID Number=33
|Initial HP=30
|HP Increase=10
|Initial ATK=7
|ATK Increase=3
|Initial DEF=3
|DEF Increase=1
|Initial RUSH=3
|RUSH Increase=1
|Effect 1=In Mutant Form, Snail ATK +###
|Initial Effect Value 1=2
|Effect Value Increase 1=2
|Effect 2=In Mutant Form, Snail Rush +###
|Initial Effect Value 2=2
|Effect Value Increase 2=2
|Effect 3=
|Initial Effect Value 3=
|Effect Value Increase 3=
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

== Source ==
Organ Chest (4% chance), Dominate Koryeo Apostle [[Koryeo_Apostles#Mutant_Hairsnake|Mutant Hairsnake]]

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Purple Organs]]
__NOTOC__
